notableEvents.label: George Springer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: George Springer grounds into a double play, first baseman Paul Goldschmidt to shortstop Anthony Volpe to pitcher Paul Blackburn. Brandon Valenzuela out at 2nd. George Springer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez doubles (6) on a ground ball to right fielder Aaron Judge. Ernie Clement scores.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Anthony Volpe steals (1) 2nd base. Anthony Volpe to 3rd. Anthony Volpe advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Brandon Valenzuela.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Max Schuemann challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Anthony Volpe steals (2) 3rd base.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Max Schuemann steals (1) 2nd base. Max Schuemann to 3rd. Max Schuemann advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by catcher Brandon Valenzuela.
